author: IGN YouTube
text:
Wholesome Direct 2026
Get ready for the latest Wholesome Direct digital showcase on Saturday, June 6, 2026 starting at 9:00 AM Pacific, 12:00 PM Eastern. Returning for its seventh iteration, Wholesome Direct is back and ready to highlight the latest up-and-coming titles for players looking for uplifting, joyful, and hopeful games. The Wholesome Games team has carefully curated a selection of 50+ emotionally resonant titles with news including world premieres, demo announcements, and many more surprises from studios and publishers of all sizes. This year's Wholesome Direct will include news and surprises from amazing developers including Frontier, NPC Studio, Stray Fawn Studio, Spry Fox, and many more, delivered by returning host and Wholesome Games organizer Jenny Windom and a variety of guest co-hosts specializing in the wholesome and cozy niche including Gab Smolders, Knimbley, NintenTalk, and more. For more information, visit https://wholesomegames.com/

#IGN #Gaming #SummerOfGaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Women-Led Games: Summer Game Fest Edition 2026
Tune-in on June 4th, 2026 at 4PM PT for the latest Women-Led Games Showcase! 

"Women-Led Games is a yearly showcase platform built to put attention where it should already be: on the women-led and majority-women studios making some of the most interesting work in the industry.

We run two flagship showcases a year, Summer alongside Summer Game Fest, Winter with The Game Awards, plus interviews, partnerships, and a community of developers, press, and players who care about the same thing we do.

The talent is already there. The platform exists to make sure you see it." 

#IGN #Gaming #SummerOfGaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Latin American Games Showcase | Summer Game Fest Edition 2026
Tune in as the showcase highlights 80 of the best and brightest games and developers from Latin America. You’ll be treated to updates on big titles from the region like Shade Protocol, Kernel Hearts, Colorbound, Sigils of Nightfall, and Tenebris Somnia, along with other major announcements. This includes over 15 release date reveals and nine world premieres!

text:
2XKO - Official Senna Gameplay Overview Trailer
Discover how to wield the black mist of Senna in 2XKO! Effortlessly switch between zoning and rushdown with Senna's unique forms and learn how to convert a stray hit into big damage! 
Fight as Senna in 2XKO on June 9th, 2026 for PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox Series X|S, and PC (Steam).

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Supergirl - Official 'Tickets Available Now' Trailer (2026) Milly Alcock, David Corenswet
Don't miss the 'Tickets Available Now' Trailer for Supergirl, an upcoming DCU film starring Milly Alcock in the dual role of Supergirl/Kara Zor-El. Tickets are available now for Supergirl, in theaters and IMAX on June 26.

When an unexpected and ruthless adversary strikes too close to home, Kara Zor-El, aka Supergirl, reluctantly joins forces with an unlikely companion on an epic, interstellar journey of vengeance and justice.

Craig Gillespie directs the film from a screenplay by Ana Nogueira.

DC Studios heads Peter Safran and James Gunn are producing the film, which is based on characters from DC, Supergirl based on characters created by Jerry Siegel and Joe Shuster. The film is executive produced by Nigel Gostelow, Chantal Nong Vo and Lars P. Winther. 

Behind the camera, Gillespie is joined by director of photography Rob Hardy, production designer Neil Lamont, editor Tatiana S. Riegel, costume designer Anna B. Sheppard, Visual Effects Supervisor Geoffrey Baumann, and composer Ramin Djawadi. 

DC Studios Presents a Troll Court Entertainment Production, The Safran Company Production, A Film by Craig Gillespie, “Supergirl,” which will be in theaters and IMAX® across North America on June 26, 2026, and internationally beginning 24 June 2026, distributed by Warner Bros. Pictures.

#Supergirl #Movies #IGN

author: IGN YouTube
text:
God of War Laufey - Official Combat First Look Trailer
Take a look at the Combat First Look Trailer for God of War Laufey, the next adventure in the third-person action-adventure God of War series developed by Sony Santa Monica. Players will get the rundown on the new additions to Laufey's core combat, with Santa Monica Studio’s combat designers detailing the new mechanics that serve Laufey's lethal agility, powerful abilities, and legendary sword weapon. God of War Laufey is coming soon to PlayStation 5 (PS5).

#GodOfWarLaufey #Gaming #IGN

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Lego Batman: Legacy of the Dark Knight - All Chapter 6 Red Bricks and Mission Collectibles
In this Lego Batman: Legacy of the Dark Knight walkthrough, we show you exactly where to find every collectible in Chapter 6: The League of Shadows Returns. Here's how to uncover every League Banner, Waynetech Cache, and the Bats Red Brick.

0:00 - Intro
00:05 - League Banner 1
00:30 - Waynetech Cache 1
00:43 - Waynetech Cache 2
01:16 - League Banner 2
01:25 - Waynetech Cache 3
01:49 - League Banner 3
02:25 - Waynetech Cache 4
02:54 - Red Brick: Bats
03:52 - League Banner 4
04:07 - Waynetech Cache 5
04:36 - League Banner 5

For more Lego Batman: Legacy of the Dark Knight tips and tricks, check out our full Wiki guide at https://www.ign.com/wikis/lego-batman-legacy-of-the-dark-knight/

#ign #gaming
